title: ortholoma minor
intro: Ortholoma minor, also known as Orthosiphon aristatus, is a plant native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ortholoma minor include reducing kidney stones, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma minor can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall urinary health and well-being.
